name: Suspicious LDAP-Attributes Used
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: xknow @xknow_infosec
SIGMA Title: Suspicious LDAP-Attributes Used
SIGMA Description: Detects the usage of particular AttributeLDAPDisplayNames, which are known for data exchange via LDAP by the tool LDAPFragger and are additionally not commonly used in companies.

False positives:
- Companies, who may use these default LDAP-Attributes for personal information

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5136 AND ("Attribute Old Value" LIKE '%' OR "Attribute New Value" LIKE '%') AND ((Username IN('primaryInternationalISDNNumber', 'otherFacsimileTelephoneNumber', 'primaryTelexNumber')) OR ("Account Name" IN('primaryInternationalISDNNumber', 'otherFacsimileTelephoneNumber', 'primaryTelexNumber')) OR ("Distinguished Name" IN('primaryInternationalISDNNumber', 'otherFacsimileTelephoneNumber', 'primaryTelexNumber'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious LDAP-Attributes Used on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5136 AND ("Attribute Old Value" LIKE '%' OR "Attribute New Value" LIKE '%') AND ((Username IN('primaryInternationalISDNNumber', 'otherFacsimileTelephoneNumber', 'primaryTelexNumber')) OR ("Account Name" IN('primaryInternationalISDNNumber', 'otherFacsimileTelephoneNumber', 'primaryTelexNumber')) OR ("Distinguished Name" IN('primaryInternationalISDNNumber', 'otherFacsimileTelephoneNumber', 'primaryTelexNumber'))) AQL filter query
